Lift + Daily Goals Tracker

Auto-saves every change. Local first, Google Sheets sync second. Baseline mode kicks in after 30 inactive days.
—

Daily

Pick a workout day to track that day's plan.
Fresh start mode
No meaningful logged days were found in the last 30 days, so the app is in fresh start mode. Enter your bodyweight first. Until bodyweight is entered, all other inputs stay locked. Then choose Baseline Test and log one controlled baseline result per exercise. Future starting goals will use about 80% of those baseline results.

1.00 g/lb
—
Uses 7-weigh-in rolling average if available, otherwise last logged weigh-in. In fresh start mode, enter bodyweight first.
Toggle means an input exists. Turning an active toggle off clears the input. Turning an inactive toggle on fills the exact goal.
